name: Osso Bucco a La Milanaise
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pound veal shanks (cut into 1 1/2-inch thick pieces)
Chopped parsley and lemon wedges for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously season the veal shanks on all sides with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge each shank lightly in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
4. Brown the shanks on both sides until golden, about 2-3 minutes per side. Work in batches if necessary.
5. Remove all the shanks from the pot and add onions, carrots, and celery. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add wine, tomatoes, stock, bay leaf, thyme, and garlic to the pot with the vegetables.
7. Return the seared shanks to the pot. Stir gently to combine.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Adjust seasonings as needed, then serve with chopped parsley and lemon wedges.
Yield: 6 servings
